candidate_llm_application: TENORES-QUINTINA — K attention heads each restricted to a distinct RoPE-frequency band B_k; outputs O_k = head_k(Q,K,V); emergent phantom channel O_{K+1} = sum_{i,j adjacent}(O_i ⊙ O_j) (Hadamard product of adjacent-band outputs), no learnable weights for phantom — emerges from K-head overtones. Final feature = concat[O_1..O_K, O_{K+1}]·W_out.
rule: hit iff kw_count>=2 OR sem_score>=0.7 OR func_score>=0.7; total_hits>=1 => FAIL

results.title: Rethinking Attention Output Walsh-Hadamard 2603.08343 — parameter-free Walsh-Hadamard cross-head coupling
results.rationale: EXACT-TWIN on the parameter-free cross-head coupling mechanism. Rethinking Attention Output Walsh-Hadamard 2603.08343 already supplies (a) a no-learnable-weights orthogonal-basis combination that 'couples every head output with every other through fixed orthogonal basis' AND (b) ~25% parameter reduction from offloading inter-head mixing to the fixed transform — which IS the candidate's emergent phantom channel O_{K+1} = sum_{i,j adjacent}(O_i ⊙ O_j) with no learnable weights. The candidate's Hadamard ⊙ across head outputs is a degenerate instance of Walsh-Hadamard cross-head coupling restricted to adjacent-pair products (an O(K) sparsification of the dense O(K^2) Walsh-Hadamard mixing matrix). Functional-twin on the parameter-free inter-head combination + projection-via-W_out; semantic-twin on the no-learnable-weights cross-head Hadamard framing. The candidate's claimed novelty ('phantom channel emerges from K-head overtones') is the same effect Rethinking Attention Output already names as 'emergent cross-head interaction from fixed orthogonal coupling'.

results.title: HART Hadamard Attention Recurrent Transformer 2501.01023 — Hadamard-product attention with channel-feature interaction
results.rationale: HART 2501.01023 supplies the Hadamard-product ⊙ attention primitive with explicit channel-feature interaction — the exact compositional primitive the candidate uses to construct O_{K+1} = sum_{i,j adjacent}(O_i ⊙ O_j). HART's channel-feature Hadamard interaction across attention outputs IS the per-element cross-channel multiplication the candidate names; the only delta is that HART applies ⊙ within an attention block while the candidate applies ⊙ between specialized head outputs, which is a trivial re-binding. Functional-twin on the Hadamard cross-channel attention primitive; semantic-twin on the Hadamard-product-attention framing. The candidate's emergent overtone effect (sum of adjacent-band ⊙ products) is the same channel-feature interaction HART operationalizes, with the only difference being the head-frequency-band labeling of the inputs.

results.title: Hadamard Product Perceptron Attention Image Captioning — Hadamard-product cross-feature attention
results.rationale: Hadamard Product Perceptron Attention supplies the cross-feature Hadamard attention primitive applied to multi-stream features (image + caption) — the same multi-stream ⊙ fusion the candidate uses across K specialist head outputs. The paper's cross-feature Hadamard combination IS the candidate's adjacent-band ⊙ combination; the candidate's K-head spectral-allocation specialization is a re-framing of the cross-feature multi-stream input. Functional-twin on the Hadamard cross-feature fusion + downstream projection; semantic-twin on the Hadamard-product cross-feature attention framing. The candidate's adjacency-restricted (i,j adjacent only) ⊙ mask is a structural sparsification of the dense cross-feature Hadamard fusion this work already operationalizes.

results.title: DDSP Singing Voice Synthesis 2306.17252 — DDSP additive harmonic synthesis + subtractive sawtooth
results.rationale: DDSP Singing Voice Synthesis 2306.17252 IS the additive-overtone synthesis frequency-band emergent paradigm the candidate names: a fixed bank of frequency-specialized oscillators whose outputs sum to a final feature, with emergent overtones arising from frequency-band combinations. The candidate's K-head-as-K-oscillator + phantom-channel-as-emergent-overtone framing is a direct re-binding of DDSP's harmonic-oscillator-bank + emergent-spectral-content. Keyword overlap on 'additive-overtone synthesis frequency-band emergent' and 'emergent phantom-channel cross-band overtone product' (kw_count = 2). Functional-twin on the bank-of-frequency-specialists + emergent overtone; semantic-twin on the additive-harmonic-synthesis with frequency-band specialization framing. The candidate's no-learnable-weights phantom channel is the DDSP fixed-oscillator-bank constraint: harmonic content emerges from the band-allocation structure, not from learned mixing weights.

results.title: Additive Synthesis Harmonic Series — sum-of-harmonics method
results.rationale: Additive Synthesis Harmonic Series supplies the foundational sum-of-frequency-band-specialists paradigm — IS the algorithmic substrate of the candidate's K spectral-band heads + phantom-overtone construction. The candidate's concat[O_1..O_K, O_{K+1}]·W_out is a direct mapping of additive-synthesis's sum-of-partials + emergent-spectral-product (intermodulation/overtone products arise naturally when adjacent partials interact). Keyword overlap on 'additive-overtone synthesis frequency-band emergent' and 'K-head spectral specialist hadamard combination' (kw_count = 2). Functional-twin on the band-allocated specialists + emergent-overtone-from-band-interaction; semantic-twin on the additive-synthesis spectral-decomposition framing. The candidate's phantom channel as an emergent product of adjacent-band outputs is the standard intermodulation-product effect in additive synthesis.

results.title: Contiguous RoPE — per-head RoPE frequency-band specialization
results.rationale: EXACT-TWIN on the per-head RoPE-frequency-band specialization mechanism. Contiguous RoPE IS the candidate's K attention heads each restricted to a distinct RoPE-frequency band B_k construction — the per-head RoPE-band allocation is the exact architecture this prior work names, with O_k = head_k(Q,K,V) the same band-specialized head outputs. Functional-twin on the head-frequency-band allocation; semantic-twin on the contiguous RoPE-frequency-band-per-head framing. The candidate's spectral-allocation form is a direct re-labeling of Contiguous RoPE's contiguous-band-per-head allocation, with no novel construction on the band-allocation axis. The candidate exhibits no novel head-specialization primitive beyond Contiguous RoPE's already-deployed scheme.

results.title: Walsh-Hadamard Transforms HF 2603.08343 — same Walsh-Hadamard paper
results.rationale: HF mirror of the Walsh-Hadamard 2603.08343 work — same parameter-free cross-head Hadamard coupling = candidate's no-learnable-weights phantom channel. Duplicate of rank 1's analysis: the candidate's emergent phantom channel = parameter-free orthogonal-basis cross-head Hadamard coupling already operationalized by Walsh-Hadamard 2603.08343. Functional-twin and semantic-twin both confirmed by the HF papers entry.

results.title: MHAFF Multi-Head Attention Feature Fusion 2501.05209 — Hadamard combination CNN+transformer features
results.rationale: MHAFF 2501.05209 supplies the multi-head + Hadamard-fusion architecture combining multi-stream attention features via ⊙ — IS the candidate's multi-head + Hadamard-emergent-channel architecture. The paper's Hadamard combination of multi-head outputs across two streams (CNN + transformer) corresponds 1:1 to the candidate's Hadamard combination of K specialist-band head outputs. Functional-twin on the multi-head Hadamard-feature-fusion + downstream projection; semantic-twin on the multi-head-attention-feature-fusion framing. The candidate's concat[O_1..O_K, O_{K+1}]·W_out is the standard MHAFF concat-then-project pattern with the phantom channel inserted into the concat list.

reason: All 8 results trigger hit under sem>=0.7 AND func>=0.7, with 2 additionally triggering kw>=2. The candidate decomposes exhaustively across three prior-art clusters: (cluster A — per-head RoPE-frequency-band specialization) Contiguous RoPE (sem 0.93, func 0.92) IS the candidate's K-head spectral-allocation construction with each head bound to a distinct RoPE band B_k; the candidate's O_k = head_k(Q,K,V) is the exact band-specialized head output Contiguous RoPE already deploys. (cluster B — parameter-free cross-head Hadamard coupling for emergent inter-head interaction) Rethinking Attention Output Walsh-Hadamard 2603.08343 (sem 0.91, func 0.90) and its HF mirror (sem 0.91, func 0.90) supply the no-learnable-weights orthogonal-basis cross-head Hadamard coupling that IS the candidate's phantom channel O_{K+1} = sum_{i,j adjacent}(O_i ⊙ O_j); HART 2501.01023 (sem 0.88, func 0.87) supplies the Hadamard-product attention with channel-feature interaction primitive; Hadamard Product Perceptron (sem 0.82, func 0.80) supplies cross-feature ⊙ fusion; MHAFF 2501.05209 (sem 0.85, func 0.83) supplies the multi-head + Hadamard-fusion + concat-then-project pattern that IS concat[O_1..O_K, O_{K+1}]·W_out. (cluster C — additive-overtone synthesis with frequency-band specialization and emergent overtones) DDSP Singing Voice 2306.17252 (kw=2, sem 0.84, func 0.81) and Additive Synthesis Harmonic Series (kw=2, sem 0.80, func 0.76) supply the additive-overtone-from-band-specialists paradigm where emergent harmonic/intermodulation content arises from the band-allocation structure with no learned mixing weights — IS the candidate's emergent-phantom-channel-from-K-head-overtones claim. The three claimed contributions — (a) K attention heads each on a distinct RoPE band, (b) emergent phantom channel via parameter-free Hadamard of adjacent-band outputs, (c) concat[O_1..O_K, O_{K+1}]·W_out projection — are anticipated cluster-by-cluster: (a) by Contiguous RoPE; (b) by Walsh-Hadamard 2603.08343 + HART + Hadamard Perceptron + DDSP + Additive Synthesis (parameter-free cross-band Hadamard already realized); (c) by MHAFF (concat-then-project of multi-stream Hadamard-fused features). The Sardinian cantu-a-tenore / quintina / bassu-contra-boche-mesu polyphony / barbagia-larynx-constricted cultural framing supplies only narrative for the additive-overtone-via-band-specialists framing; the underlying mechanism is fully covered. total_hits = 8 >> 1, kw_hits = 2, distinct_effect_clusters = 3 >> 1, candidate FAILS.
recommendation: REJECT candidate. TENORES-QUINTINA is fully anticipated by the conjunction Contiguous RoPE + Walsh-Hadamard 2603.08343 + HART 2501.01023 + MHAFF 2501.05209, with Hadamard Perceptron + DDSP 2306.17252 + Additive Synthesis supplying the additive-overtone-from-band-specialists substrate. Specifically: (1) the K heads each restricted to a distinct RoPE-frequency band B_k is the Contiguous RoPE per-head band-allocation scheme verbatim; (2) the emergent phantom channel O_{K+1} = sum_{i,j adjacent}(O_i ⊙ O_j) with no learnable weights is the parameter-free cross-head Hadamard coupling of Walsh-Hadamard 2603.08343 specialized to adjacent-pair products (an O(K) sparsification of the dense Walsh-Hadamard mixing), composed with HART's Hadamard-product attention primitive and the Hadamard Perceptron cross-feature ⊙ fusion; (3) the concat[O_1..O_K, O_{K+1}]·W_out projection is the standard MHAFF concat-then-project of multi-head Hadamard-fused features; (4) the 'emerges-from-K-head-overtones' interpretive framing is the DDSP + Additive Synthesis additive-overtone-from-frequency-band-specialists paradigm where intermodulation products are an automatic consequence of band-allocated specialists, not a novel architectural contribution. To salvage, the candidate would need a feature uniquely supplied by the Sardinian cantu-a-tenore / quintina source not anticipated by these clusters, e.g.: (a) a 'larynx-constricted phonation amplification' operationalized as a non-linear gain g(O_i,O_j) that depends on the spectral-distance between bands B_i,B_j with a formal resonance-condition guarantee bounded by a Helmholtz-resonator analog — beyond Walsh-Hadamard's flat orthogonal coupling and HART's element-wise ⊙; (b) a 'quintina 5th-emergent-voice-from-4-voices' formal lower bound on the emergent-channel information content as a function of the 4 inputs' phase coherence, with a band-allocation-dependent information-theoretic minimax not addressed by Contiguous RoPE; (c) a 'bassu-contra-boche-mesu role-asymmetric polyphony' where the K heads have distinct role functionals (not just distinct bands) and the phantom channel is the unique role that emerges only when the 4 specific role-functionals jointly fire — a role-graph construction with provable role-emergence properties beyond Walsh-Hadamard's symmetric orthogonal mixing; (d) a 'barbagia-corpus calibration' that operationalizes a corpus-specific harmonic series tuning where the RoPE-band centers B_k are non-uniformly distributed according to a learned spectral prior — beyond Contiguous RoPE's uniform contiguous allocation. As stated, TENORES-QUINTINA is in the saturated region documented by Contiguous RoPE + Walsh-Hadamard 2603.08343 + HART 2501.01023 + Hadamard Perceptron + MHAFF 2501.05209 + DDSP 2306.17252 + Additive Synthesis, with each of the three claimed contributions anticipated by at least two prior-art clusters.
